LOANSYSTEM.shop.confirm_text:
You will immediately receive {0} gold and obtain the special relic 'IOU'.

Total debt: {1} gold (interest: {2} gold)

While holding the IOU:
- 50% of all gold gained goes to debt repayment
- Gain 1 Dexterity at the start of turn 3 in each combat
- If debt remains unpaid before Act 3 boss, receive 1 random curse
- When debt is cleared, remove IOU and gain 1 common potion

You can only borrow once per run.
LOANSYSTEM.default.title: Debt Collection
LOANSYSTEM.default.message: The merchant has come to settle accounts. Your unpaid debt will now exact its price.
LOANSYSTEM.iou_relic.name: IOU
LOANSYSTEM.iou_relic.description:
50% of all gold gained goes to debt repayment. While debt remains, gain 1 Dexterity at the start of turn 3 in each combat. When debt is cleared, remove this relic and gain 1 common potion. If debt remains unpaid before Act 3 boss rest site, receive 1 random curse.

Remaining debt: {0} gold
